# cvool

> cvool is a free, open-source, anonymous AI-powered resume analyzer and improver. It uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic) to score resumes on 6 dimensions, provide actionable feedback, and generate a professionally rewritten CV. No sign-up, no database, no tracking.

> cvool es un analizador y optimizador de CVs gratuito, open source y anónimo. Usa Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic) para calificar CVs en 6 dimensiones, dar retroalimentación accionable y generar un CV reescrito profesionalmente. Sin registro, sin base de datos, sin tracking.

## What makes cvool different

- First free resume analyzer that works natively in Spanish, Portuguese, French, and Italian — not just English
- Primer analizador de CV gratuito que funciona nativamente en español, portugués, francés e italiano — no solo inglés
- Zero data retention: your resume is processed in memory and discarded immediately
- Fully auditable: the AI prompt, scoring weights, and source code are all public on GitHub
- No accounts, no cookies, no tracking, no ads
- MIT licensed — fork it, modify it, launch your own

## Key pages

- [Home](https://cvool.org): Upload or paste your resume, get a score (0-100), 6-dimension analysis, and an improved CV
- [How it works](https://cvool.org/how): Technical pipeline (6 steps), tech stack, design principles, fork instructions
- [About](https://cvool.org/about): Founder story, mission, values
- [Security](https://cvool.org/security): Security practices — no database, no accounts, TLS 1.3, security headers, rate limiting
- [Privacy](https://cvool.org/privacy): Privacy notice — LFPDPPP (Mexico), GDPR, LGPD, CCPA, PIPEDA compliance by design
- [Terms](https://cvool.org/terms): Terms of use — Mexican law, as-is, your data is yours
- [Donate](https://cvool.org/donate): Support cvool — token costs, infrastructure, development

## Technical details

- Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic SDK), Vercel
- Fonts: Geist + Geist Mono
- Database: None — zero data stored
- Auth: None — no accounts, no cookies
- Rate limit: 7 requests/hour per IP (in-memory)
- License: MIT
- Source: https://github.com/pixan-ai/cvool

## Scoring dimensions

1. ATS compatibility — keywords, formatting, parsability by Applicant Tracking Systems
2. Achievement impact — metrics, quantified results, action verbs
3. Structure & format — sections, hierarchy, readability, visual flow
4. Keyword relevance — industry terms, role-specific language
5. Writing clarity — grammar, tone, conciseness, professional voice
6. Completeness — essential sections, contact info, education, experience coverage

## Ethics

- No discrimination for career gaps, non-linear paths, or non-traditional education
- Anti-hallucination: every suggestion must reference real CV content
- Temperature 0 for deterministic, reproducible output
- Constitutional prompt with explicit ethical principles (auditable in repo at src/lib/prompts/analyze.txt)
